//: Hand-transpiled from examples/test_20_pure_counter.ev — a REAL corpus
//2: example run through the SMT-LIB path. count = is_first_tick ? 0 :
//3: _count+1; the previous tick's IntToStr result is read back via the
//5: the printed line with SMT-LIB str.++ . Must match `evident effect-run

fsms.smtlib:
(declare-const count Int)
(declare-const _count Int)
(declare-const is_first_tick Bool)
(declare-const fmt_str String)
(declare-const line String)
(declare-const g_start Bool)
(declare-const g_le3 Bool)
(declare-const g_mid Bool)
(declare-const g_gt3 Bool)
(assert (= count (ite is_first_tick 0 (+ _count 1))))
(assert (= line (str.++ "count = " fmt_str)))
(assert (= g_start (= count 0)))
(assert (= g_le3 (<= count 3)))
(assert (= g_mid (and (>= count 1) (<= count 3))))
(assert (= g_gt3 (> count 3)))
